# Pattern Extensibility for KB Editor

> KB Editor (`kbbridge.genexus-visual-editor`) is the GeneXus visual editor inside VS Code /
> VSCodium. It exposes a PatternExtensionAPI that lets pattern providers add custom types
> (dynamic dropdowns), captions (node labels), custom actions (context commands) and node
> icons (bundled resource icons) to the editing of GeneXus pattern instances (.gxPattern).
> This file indexes the documentation
> for humans and LLMs.

## Concepts

- [Introduction](01-introduction.md): the problem, the solution, and the glossary.
- [GeneXus pattern concepts](02-genexus-pattern-concepts.md): .Pattern / *Instance.xml /
  *Settings.xml, attribute types, and where custom(...) types come from.
- [Extensibility architecture](03-extensibility-architecture.md): layers, the
  activation/registration lifecycle, and graceful degradation.
- [The extensibility mechanisms](04-extensibility-mechanisms.md): Custom Types, Captions,
  Custom Actions, Node icons (plus optional Variables).
- [C# → TypeScript workflow](05-csharp-to-typescript-workflow.md): how to transcribe a
  GeneXus .NET pattern to TypeScript, with the .NET→SDK mapping.
- [Getting started](06-getting-started.md): install KB Editor, clone the starter, build,
  package, test.

## Projects (source of truth & deeper docs)

- [kbbridge-editor-genexus-sdk](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-genexus-sdk): the SDK (`@kbbridge/genexus-sdk`, MIT) you code against.
- [kbbridge-editor-pattern-starter](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-starter): blank template; see its ai/ folder for the full build guide.
- [kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith): complete worked example (GeneXus Work With port); see its ai/
  folder including [SDK-REFERENCE.md](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith/blob/main/ai/SDK-REFERENCE.md) and [EXAMPLES.md](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith/blob/main/ai/EXAMPLES.md).
- [kbbridge-editor-pattern-extensions-releases](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-extensions-releases): download platform/catalog of pattern extensions.

## Key reference

- SDK surface (exact interfaces): [kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith/ai/SDK-REFERENCE.md](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith/blob/main/ai/SDK-REFERENCE.md)
- Mechanism guides: [ai/EXTENSIBILITY-CUSTOM-TYPES.md](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith/blob/main/ai/EXTENSIBILITY-CUSTOM-TYPES.md), [ai/EXTENSIBILITY-CAPTIONS.md](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith/blob/main/ai/EXTENSIBILITY-CAPTIONS.md),
  [ai/EXTENSIBILITY-CUSTOM-ACTIONS.md](https://github.com/jmblamasuy/kbbridge-editor-pattern-genexus-workwith/blob/main/ai/EXTENSIBILITY-CUSTOM-ACTIONS.md)
